# docx/table-semantics

- Source: hand-authored WordprocessingML and JSON oracle, maintained in this repository.
- Producer: no Microsoft Office, LibreOffice, Google Workspace, or third-party document output was used.
- Redistribution: permitted; all content is repository-authored.
- Purpose: future structural table API coverage for paragraphs, grid spans, raw vertical merge states, omitted grid columns, nested block order, run revisions, deleted rows, and invalid properties.
- Sanitization: not applicable; the fixture was created from synthetic text and contains no private document content.
